changes: Added reminder option in the task creation sidebar.
Implemented internal desktop notification and toast message system.
Replaced browser delete confirmation popup with a custom in-app confirmation dialog.
Implemented dynamic bubble water-level visualization based on subtask completion.
Added floating task list panel at the top-right corner showing all tasks.
Added tooltips for all interactive elements.
Implemented smart tooltip positioning based on the nearest desktop edge.
Enabled Enter key support for saving and confirming actions.
Improved Escape key behavior for closing dialogs and cancelling actions.
**Enhanced notification system for reminders, deadlines, and updates**
Improved overall user experience and interaction consistency.
Added easy access bar at bottom
Editing task option by hovering on it
Click on it show all the deatils of the task.
